title: She'erah #7609
definition:
Sherah = "kinswoman"

 1) daughter of Ephraim and foundress of the Beth-horons and of a town
    called after her Uzzen-sherah
nasbUsage:

 1) daughter of Ephraim and foundress of the Beth-horons and of a town
    called after her Uzzen-sherah
